title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.444 - John Jordan "Buck" O'Neil Memorial Bridge designated on U.S. Highway 169 for bridge crossing over Missouri River from Jackson County to Clay County
text:
227.444.  John Jordan "Buck" O'Neil Memorial Bridge designated on U.S. Highway 169 for bridge crossing over Missouri River from Jackson County to Clay County. — The bridge on U.S. Highway 169 crossing over the Missouri River from Jackson County to Clay County shall be designated the "John Jordan " Buck " O'Neil Memorial Bridge".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating the bridge, with the costs for such designation to be paid for by private donation.
(L. 2016 H.B. 2591, et al.)
